texto: What is there in man so worthy of honor and reverence as this that he is capable of contemplating something higher than his own reason more sublime than the whole universe- that Spirit which alone is self-subsis-tent from which all truth proceeds without which there is no truth?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Friedrich Jacobi que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “What is there in man so worthy of honor and reverence as this that he is capable of contemplating…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, god, which, com foco em reflexao.
